title: VATOS Transport Truck Toys Cars for Boys Ages 3 4 5 6, Portable Truck Toy with 6 Race Cars, Best Gift Carrier Vehicles Toys Set for Kids
features: 🚚Storage Transportation Truck Car Toys: Basically all children like toy cars, no matter boys or girls. VATOS transport truck is not only an ordinary car toy, but also a racing car. As long as the collected track is put down, children can experience the fun of competition at any time!

🚚Educational and Construction Toy Set: The transport truck for children is helpful to the development of hand-eye coordination and early preschool education, such as thinking and imagination, creativity, shape recognition, hand-eye coordination and cognitive process. Through hands-on placement of toy cars, children can improve their practical ability and recognize different types of vehicles.

🚚Safe and High-quality Toddler Boy Toys: All accessories of this car are made of non-toxic ABS plastic, so don't worry about being harmful to children's health. Without batteries, the car is ejected by the force of return. We recommend that children over 3 years old use it.

🚚What is included in the toy car set: VATOS's transport car set includes 1 oversized carrier car and 6 cool toy cars. Children will soon be attracted by all kinds of cool toy cars, which are very interesting and easy to operate, and do not need to use remote control.

🚚Ideal Gift for Kids: If you don't know what gift to give to children on birthday, Christmas, holiday, New Year or Children's Day, this toy car is very suitable. It has six mini cars of different colors and a portable handle, which is the perfect gift for boys aged 3-7
description: Product Description Transport Truck Toy Set The toy car construction car kit has bright color matching different from other products, and stands out among a number of similar products. Easy to carry handle design, convenient to play anytime and anywhere. The multiple transportation grid design is convenient for storage, which can park 24 cars at the same time, greatly saving storage space. The dual-track track design is suitable for the duel between two racing cars, without the need to install batteries. The car can easily rush out of the track through the back-pull jet driving force, which is very suitable for children over 3 years old Why choose VATOS transport container truck? -It contains an oversized container truck (length * width * height 15 * 4.2 * 7.3 inches), and its container can also be expanded into two 165cm super-long tracks (length * width * height 65 * 4.2 * 5.3 inches). -6 cool racing cars (white, orange, red, yellow, black, lemon green) -Overall bright color (orange+blue) Made of high-quality ABS material If you want children to have fun and peace of mind, the quality of toys must stand the test. This VATOS container truck toy is made of high-quality ABS plastic. It has no peculiar smell and is strong. Even if it falls from a high place, it doesn't need to worry about any damage, Transport Truck Toys This oversized transport car includes 6pcs small racing cars in different colors, with smooth models and cool colors, which can easily catch the eyes of children, especially the boys aged 3-5 who love racing Gift for boys aged 4-7 As a portable container truck integrating transportation and racing, it has a variety of playing methods and is easy to store. It can not only enjoy the fun of competition with children, but also simulate various scenes with accessories. It is an ideal holiday gift.
